channel.title: SafeRoute
channel.description: Travel theft and scam prevention map for Korean travelers.

item.title: SafeRoute Travel Safety Map
item.description: Mobile-first travel map for theft, phone snatch, bag safety, and tourist scam prevention scenes.

item.title: Travel Theft and Scam Prevention Guide
item.description: Practical checklist for stations, photo spots, cafes, night movement, and first response after a travel theft.

item.title: SafeRoute Field Notes
item.description: How SafeRoute interprets theft and scam risk through hands, attention, fatigue, approach proposals, and first-response routines.

item.title: City Risk Context
item.description: City-level travel safety context for Barcelona, Paris, Rome, London, Bangkok, Ho Chi Minh City, Tokyo, New York, Istanbul, and Amsterdam.

item.title: About SafeRoute
item.description: SafeRoute service purpose, editorial boundaries, and operating principles.
